name: Rhema: Check-in Alert
subject: {{ child_name }} has arrived at Rhema Daycare

name: Rhema: Check-out Alert
subject: {{ child_name }} has been picked up
response: Check-out recorded at {{ checkout_time }}. Have a great evening!

name: Rhema: Late Pickup Alert
subject: Late pickup alert — {{ child_name }}
response:
{{ child_name }} is still at Rhema Daycare — {{ minutes_late }} minutes past the pickup cutoff.

{% if fee %}

Late fee: KES {{ fee }}.

{% endif %}

— Rhema Daycare team

name: Rhema: Absence Alert
subject: Absence alert — {{ child_name }} has not checked in
response:
{{ child_name }} has not checked in at Rhema Daycare by the expected time.

If this is a planned absence, no action is needed. If unexpected, please contact us immediately.

— Rhema Daycare team

name: Rhema: Enrollment Approved
subject: {{ child_name }}'s enrollment has been approved
response:
Good news — {{ child_name }}'s enrollment at Rhema Daycare has been approved. They are now available for check-in and billing.

— Rhema Daycare team

name: Rhema: Invoice Generated
subject: Invoice {{ invoice_number }} generated
response:
A new invoice {{ invoice_number }} for KES {{ outstanding_amount }} has been generated.

Due date: {{ due_date }}

Please pay via your parent portal.

— Rhema Daycare team

name: Rhema: Payment Reminder
subject: Payment reminder — Invoice {{ invoice_number }}
response:
Invoice {{ invoice_number }} for KES {{ outstanding_amount }} is overdue.

Due date: {{ due_date }}

Please pay via your parent portal.

— Rhema Daycare team
